title: stelis colossus
intro: Stelis colossus, also known as the giant stelis orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis colossus include its ability to reduce inflammation, boost the immune system, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Stelis colossus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
